cards.name: Staff of Defense
cards.type_line: Item — Staff (requires attunement by B, S, WA or W)
rules_text: While holding it, you can use an action to expend 1 charge to cast Mage Armor on yourself.
When you are hit by an attack, you can use your reaction to expend 2 charges to cast Shield.
The staff regains 1d6 + 4 expended charges daily at dawn. If you expend the last charge, roll a d20. On a 1, the staff crumbles to dust.
cards.flavor_text: A quiet hum runs through the wood, as if invisible wards wait to awaken.
cards.author: wschu

cards.name: Staff of Charming
cards.type_line: Item — Staff (requires attunement by B, C, D, S, WA or W)
rules_text: This staff has 10 charges and can be used as a magic quarterstaff.
While holding it, you can use an action to expend 1 charge to cast charm person, command, or comprehend languages using your spell save DC.
If you fail a saving throw against an enchantment spell that targets only you, you can turn the failure into a success. Once used, this property can't be used again until the next dawn.
If you succeed on such a saving throw, you can use your reaction and expend 1 charge to reflect the spell back at its caster as if you had cast it.
The staff regains 1d8 + 2 expended charges daily at dawn. If the last charge is used, roll a d20. On a 1, the staff becomes a nonmagical quarterstaff.
cards.flavor_text: The staff does not force obedience — it simply reminds minds how pleasant agreement can be.
cards.author: wschu

cards.name: Staff of Fire
cards.type_line: Item — Staff (requires attunement by D, S, WA or W)
rules_text: While holding this staff, you have resistance to fire damage.

The staff has 10 charges. While holding it, you can use an action to expend charges to cast one of the following spells using your spell save DC: burning hands (1 charge), fireball (3 charges), or wall of fire (4 charges).
The staff regains 1d6 + 4 expended charges daily at dawn.
If you expend the last charge, roll a d20. On a 1, the staff blackens, crumbles into cinders, and is destroyed.
cards.flavor_text: Within the staff sleeps a patient inferno, waiting only for a will strong enough to awaken it.
cards.author: wschu
